changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'getCandidateAssigneesByTaskType');
changeSet.rollback: DELETE FROM public.au_service WHERE name = 'getCandidateAssigneesByTaskType';

changeSet.author: vvitzilaios
changeSet.comment: Associate the new au_service with appropriate au_rules for REGULATOR on REQUEST_TASK resource types
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus CROSS JOIN au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getCandidateAssigneesByTaskType' AND aur.resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' AND aur.resource_sub_type IN ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT') AND aur.handler = 'requestTaskAccessHandler' AND aur.role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND aur.scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_EXECUTE';
changeSet.rollback: DELETE FROM au_service_rule WHERE service_id IN (SELECT id FROM au_service WHERE name = 'getCandidateAssigneesByTaskType') AND rule_id IN ( SELECT id FROM au_rule WHERE resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' AND resource_sub_type IN ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT') AND handler = 'requestTaskAccessHandler' AND role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_EXECUTE' );
